excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Chinese Linguistics and Language Acquisition lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-02-28. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 28 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
